tagline.line1: No ads. No investors. No agenda.
tagline.line2: Free at the base tier, forever.

footer.privacy: Your selfie is processed in-memory and never stored. Aesthetic analysis runs locally where possible; AI analysis sends only the image bytes to Anthropic and is never logged.

banner.regionAria: Add HiveAestheticBestie to your home screen
banner.home: Add HiveAestheticBestie to your home screen for one-tap aesthetic check-ins. Free, no signup, your selfie never leaves your device unless you ask for AI analysis.

firstVisit.body: Drop a selfie or a vibe in plain words. Get back a label, a palette, and an outfit cue — like a best friend who's always honest.
